title: Best Income Stocks to Buy for June 9th
text: CCU, AMR and ERIE made it to the Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy) income stocks list on June 9, 2023.

title: What Makes Erie Indemnity (ERIE) a New Strong Buy Stock
text: Erie Indemnity (ERIE) might move higher on growing optimism about its earnings prospects, which is reflected by its upgrade to a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy).
